description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of brick and white plaster exterior walls. The front includes a large, tiled patio area and double glass doors, while the rear has a fenced green yard and a prominent garage door. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a combination of large and small panes, and the upper floor includes a balcony or open terrace. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the second floor set back from the main facade, creating a stepped profile. The overall look is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick and white plaster exterior, large windows, and a mix of patio and green yard spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiled patio, double glass doors, and a partial view of the upper floor's open terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, upper floor setback, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large garage door, fenced green yard, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the extended brick facade and the green yard area with fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with a tiled patio, no porch or overhang, minimalistic modern style
